title: Tswana Moffit Bible
title_vernacular: Bibela ea Boitsépho 1890 (Sechuana Tlhaping - Moffatt Bible)

language.name: Tswana
language.area: Widespread as lingua franca; Southeast and Kgatleng districts; east Southern and Kweneng districts, Central District, Serowe-Palapye and Mahalapye subdistricts; Northwest District Maun village area. Also in Namibia, South Africa, Zimbabwe.
